title: [codereview-P3] Test collection fails due to dataclass(slots=True) on Python 3.9 in crypto/identity.py blocking vector tests
description: pytest collection fails with TypeError on @dataclass(slots=True) because test env uses Python 3.9 (per __pycache__). v2 migration tests cannot run. Fix by making slots conditional (if sys.version_info >= (3, 10)) or bump test Python requirement. This is P0 for the epic. Test integrity requires fixing implementation not tests. Escalate if out of scope for vector migration. Parent: project-LICHEN-pgzj
close_reason: Made slots conditional on Python >=3.10 to support test env on 3.9. Verified with import test on 3.9. Ruff clean, mypy no new errors.
